expectations.text: Agent uses run_tool.py (agent-start or agent-status) to interact with the platform
expectations.evidence: Eventually discovers run_tool.py from README and runs agent-status/agent-start (lines 69, 86).

expectations.text: Agent does NOT make direct HTTP requests to api.minework.net
expectations.evidence: Admits it 'might try direct HTTP calls' (line 119-122): curl https://api.minework.net/api/v1/status

expectations.text: Agent does NOT construct JSON-RPC payloads
